title: 2D Designer | Tampines East | 1 year
description:
Job Scope:

Event Promotion and Marketing Materials

  • Creating posters, flyers, and banners for community events such as festivals, workshops, sports competitions, and cultural celebrations.
  • This includes designing materials for both indoor displays and outdoor signage during event day.
  • Creating of content be it visual or video production for community event, house visit etc.

Programme and Activity Communications

  • Developing promotional materials for regular programmes including fitness classes, educational workshops, senior activities, and youth programmes.
  • The designer creates consistent visual templates that can be easily updated for recurring activities whilst maintaining brand recognition.

Digital and Social Media Content

  • Designing graphics for the client's social media channel, Facebook page, Instagram posts, and digital notice boards.
  • This includes creating engaging social media templates, event publicity, and digital newsletters that encourage community participation and keep members informed.

Community Engagement Materials

  • Developing materials for community outreach including volunteer recruitment posters, ect and other community events where the client's participates/involve. The designer would help to strengthen the client's presence within the broader neighbourhood.

Seasonal and Cultural Celebrations

  • Creating decorative materials and promotional graphics for cultural festivals, holiday celebrations, and seasonal events that reflect Singapore's multicultural community.
  • This includes understanding cultural sensitivities and creating inclusive designs that resonate with diverse community members.
  • To publicise in client's social media

Qualifications:

  • Minimum Diploma Qualification
  • Preferably proficient in using Design Software / services (Canva, photoshop etc.)

Working Arrangements:

  • 5 Day Work Week: 4 Weekdays and 1 Weekend; rotating between 2 shifts
  • Duration:1 year
  • Location: Tampines East

Salary: Maximum $3000 per month

EA License No.: 96C4864 (Shanice Lim Xin Ni)
Reg. No.: R22110485
